🚨 HARDIK PANDYA’S UNCONVENTIONAL ROAD TO CWC 2027 🚨 [Rohit Juglan]

- Currently training in Bengaluru.
- Focused entirely on long-term fitness and skill upgrades.
- Practicing extensively on concrete and tiled surfaces.
- Mimicking the extreme bounce and pace of South African conditions.
- Facing high-speed plastic balls in the nets.
- Aiming to sharpen his reflexes against lethal bouncer barrages.
- Actively mastering the paddle sweep shot.
- Developing new spin-tackling options for the middle overs.
- Bowling a massive 12 overs every single day.
- Delivering 5 to 6 of those overs at absolute peak intensity.

2080717640201601083.full_text: Hanuma Vihari said: "These guys should get more opportunities in the IPL. For example, Mayank Yadav missed out last season because there were also Prince Yadav, Mohsin Khan, and Avesh Khan in LSG, so you can miss out. If he moves out of LSG, he will get more chances and can play consistently. But one thing about LSG is that they retained him even if he was not able to play all games, took care of his surgery and have groomed him, so definitely the loyalty factor will be there."
